narrative:
Leetonia Ex Vill Sd (Columbiana) exempted village school district has 2,875 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a clear Republican lean of 9.4 percentage points.
